---
title: "About"
about:
    template: trestles
    image: assets/anthony-raborn.jpg
    image-shape: rounded
    links:
        - icon: bluesky
          text: Bluesky
          href: https://bsky.app/profile/raborndecisionsciences.com
        - icon: github
          text: Github
          href: https://github.com/raborn-decision-sciences
        - icon: linkedin
          text: LinkedIn
          href: https://www.linkedin.com/company/raborn-decision-sciences
        - icon: envelope-fill
          text: Email
          href: mailto:hello@raborndecisionsciences.com 
---

Anthony Raborn is a psychometrician/statistician specializing in applied measurement, reproducible analytics, and custom R/Shiny decision tools.

My work combines psychometric methods, statistical programming, and practical software development to help organizations make clearer decisions from complex assessment and operational data. I strive to provide tools that make work easier to repeat, explain, and use for all levels of technical expertise.

## Education

Univesrity of Florida | Gainesville, FL | May 2019

PhD in Research and Evaluation Methodology, Minor in Statistics

## Areas of expertise

- Psychometrics and assessment analytics
- Item analysis, DIF, equating, standard setting, and technical reporting
- R package development, deployment, and reproducible workflows
- Shiny dashboards and decision-support tools
- Quarto reports and technical documentation
- Operations and break-even modeling

## Technical toolkit

```{=html}
<style>
/* 1. The container hides everything outside its bounds */
.ticker-container {
  width: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: $body-bg;
  color: $body-color;
  padding: 10px 0;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

/* 2. The wrapper contains two identical sets of content */
.ticker-wrapper {
  display: inline-block;
  animation: seamless-scroll 20s linear infinite;
}

.ticker-item {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0 40px;
  font-weight: bold;
}

/* 3. Animate exactly half the total width of the wrapper */
@keyframes seamless-scroll {
  from { transform: translateX(0); }
  to { transform: translateX(-50%); }
}

/* Pause on hover for readability */
.ticker-container:hover .ticker-wrapper {
  animation-play-state: paused;
}
</style>

<div class="ticker-container">
  <div class="ticker-wrapper">
        <!-- Set 1 -->
        <div class="ticker-item">R</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">Shiny</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">Quarto</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">SQL</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">Git/GitHub</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">Winsteps</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">flexMIRT</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">Mplus</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">Python</div>
        <!-- Set 2 -->
        <div class="ticker-item">R</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">Shiny</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">Quarto</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">SQL</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">Git/GitHub</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">Winsteps</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">flexMIRT</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">Mplus</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">Python</div>
    </div>
</div>
```

## Resume/CV

[Download consulting.CV](assets/anthony-raborn-cv.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
